lines.english: Lesson 6
lines.chinese: 第6课
lines.raw: Lesson 6 | 第6课

lines.english: Smash-and-grab
lines.chinese: 砸橱窗抢劫
lines.raw: Smash-and-grab | 砸橱窗抢劫

lines.english: How did Mr. Taylor try to stop the thieves?
lines.chinese: 泰勒先生是怎样试图阻止窃贼的？
lines.raw: How did Mr. Taylor try to stop the thieves? | 泰勒先生是怎样试图阻止窃贼的？

lines.english: The expensive shops in a famous arcade near Piccadilly were just opening.
lines.chinese: 靠近皮卡迪利大街的著名拱形建筑里的那些高档商店刚刚开门。
lines.raw: The expensive shops in a famous arcade near Piccadilly were just opening. | 靠近皮卡迪利大街的著名拱形建筑里的那些高档商店刚刚开门。

lines.english: At this time of the morning, the arcade was almost empty.
lines.chinese: 在早晨这个时候，拱形建筑里几乎空无一人。
lines.raw: At this time of the morning, the arcade was almost empty. | 在早晨这个时候，拱形建筑里几乎空无一人。

lines.english: Mr. Taylor, the owner of a jewellery shop was admiring a new window display.
lines.chinese: 珠宝店店主泰勒先生正在欣赏新布置的橱窗。
lines.raw: Mr. Taylor, the owner of a jewellery shop was admiring a new window display. | 珠宝店店主泰勒先生正在欣赏新布置的橱窗。

lines.english: Two of his assistants had been working busily since 8 o'clock and had only just finished.
lines.chinese: 他的两名助手从8点钟就开始忙碌，刚刚才把橱窗布置好。
lines.raw: Two of his assistants had been working busily since 8 o'clock and had only just finished. | 他的两名助手从8点钟就开始忙碌，刚刚才把橱窗布置好。

lines.english: Diamond necklaces and rings had been beautifully arranged on a background of black velvet.
lines.chinese: 钻石项链和戒指精美地摆放在黑色丝绒的衬托下。
lines.raw: Diamond necklaces and rings had been beautifully arranged on a background of black velvet. | 钻石项链和戒指精美地摆放在黑色丝绒的衬托下。

lines.english: After gazing at the display for several minutes, Mr. Taylor went back into his shop.
lines.chinese: 泰勒先生凝视橱窗几分钟之后，便回到了店里。
lines.raw: After gazing at the display for several minutes, Mr. Taylor went back into his shop. | 泰勒先生凝视橱窗几分钟之后，便回到了店里。

lines.english: The silence was suddenly broken when a large car, with its headlights on and its horn blaring, roared down the arcade.
lines.chinese: 正在这时，突然一辆开着车灯、鸣着喇叭的汽车，咆哮着冲进了拱形建筑，打破了寂静。
lines.raw: The silence was suddenly broken when a large car, with its headlights on and its horn blaring, roared down the arcade. | 正在这时，突然一辆开着车灯、鸣着喇叭的汽车，咆哮着冲进了拱形建筑，打破了寂静。

lines.english: It came to a stop outside the jeweller's.
lines.chinese: 它在珠宝店门口停了下来。
lines.raw: It came to a stop outside the jeweller's. | 它在珠宝店门口停了下来。

lines.english: One man stayed at the wheel while two others with black stockings over their faces jumped out and smashed the window of the shop with iron bars.
lines.chinese: 一个人留在驾驶座上，另外两个人则蒙着黑色丝袜跳下车，用铁棍砸碎了商店的橱窗。
lines.raw: One man stayed at the wheel while two others with black stockings over their faces jumped out and smashed the window of the shop with iron bars. | 一个人留在驾驶座上，另外两个人则蒙着黑色丝袜跳下车，用铁棍砸碎了商店的橱窗。

lines.english: While this was going on, Mr. Taylor was upstairs.
lines.chinese: 就在这当儿，泰勒先生正在楼上。
lines.raw: While this was going on, Mr. Taylor was upstairs. | 就在这当儿，泰勒先生正在楼上。

lines.english: He and his staff began throwing furniture out of the window.
lines.chinese: 他和店员开始把家具往窗外扔。
lines.raw: He and his staff began throwing furniture out of the window. | 他和店员开始把家具往窗外扔。

lines.english: Chairs and tables went flying into the arcade.
lines.chinese: 椅子和桌子飞进了拱形建筑。
lines.raw: Chairs and tables went flying into the arcade. | 椅子和桌子飞进了拱形建筑。

lines.english: One of the thieves was struck by a heavy statue,
lines.chinese: 其中一个窃贼被一尊沉重的塑像砸中，
lines.raw: One of the thieves was struck by a heavy statue, | 其中一个窃贼被一尊沉重的塑像砸中，

lines.english: but he was too busy helping himself to diamonds to notice any pain.
lines.chinese: 但他只顾忙着抢钻石，根本没注意到疼痛。
lines.raw: but he was too busy helping himself to diamonds to notice any pain. | 但他只顾忙着抢钻石，根本没注意到疼痛。

lines.english: The raid was all over in three minutes, for the men scrambled back into the car and it moved off at a fantastic speed.
lines.chinese: 抢劫在3分钟之内便结束了，因为劫匪们又争先恐后地跳上汽车，汽车以惊人的速度开走了。
lines.raw: The raid was all over in three minutes, for the men scrambled back into the car and it moved off at a fantastic speed. | 抢劫在3分钟之内便结束了，因为劫匪们又争先恐后地跳上汽车，汽车以惊人的速度开走了。

lines.english: Just as it was leaving,
lines.chinese: 就在汽车开走的时候，
lines.raw: Just as it was leaving, | 就在汽车开走的时候，

lines.english: Mr.Taylor rushed out and ran after it throwing ashtrays and vases,
lines.chinese: 泰勒先生冲了出来，一边追赶汽车，一边扔烟灰缸和花瓶，
lines.raw: Mr.Taylor rushed out and ran after it throwing ashtrays and vases, | 泰勒先生冲了出来，一边追赶汽车，一边扔烟灰缸和花瓶，

lines.english: but it was impossible to stop the thieves.
lines.chinese: 但根本无法阻止窃贼。
lines.raw: but it was impossible to stop the thieves. | 但根本无法阻止窃贼。

lines.english: They had got away with thousands of pounds worth of diamonds.
lines.chinese: 他们已带着价值数千英镑的钻石逃走了。
lines.raw: They had got away with thousands of pounds worth of diamonds. | 他们已带着价值数千英镑的钻石逃走了。
